 Läs gärna mer om oss och träffa våra medarbetare på vår karriärsida: https://karriar.accigo.se/
   

  

 Accigo är ett konsultbolag som hjälper företag och organisationer med digital affärs- och verksamhetsutveckling med tekniken som möjliggörare. För oss handlar digitalisering till 90% om människor och 10% om teknik. Det är när samspelet mellan människa och teknik fungerar som digitaliseringens fulla styrka visar sig.
   

  

 För många handlar digitalisering mest om teknik. För oss är det så otroligt mycket större. Digitalisering kan få både människor och organisationer att våga sikta högre, följa sina drömmar och öppna dörrar som de inte ens visste fanns. Och när man ser igenom tekniken och börjar skönja vilka möjligheter som gömmer sig där bakom. Då ser man att framtiden kan vara en fantastisk plats – fylld av mänsklig energi och värme – och digitalisering är inget annat än vår superkraft för att komma dit.

title: Senior .NET-utvecklare med expertis inom AI och ML
description:
*Är du en passionerad utvecklare med en stark vilja att utforska och få till innovation med den senaste tekniken? Vi söker en erfaren utvecklare som vill vara en del av ett nydanande och explorativt team inom GenAI, Agenter och Maskininlärning. Om du är redo att ta nästa steg i din karriär och arbeta med banbrytande teknik, då är detta möjligheten för dig!*
**Om jobbet**
 I rollen som Senior .NET-utvecklare med expertis inom AI och ML kommer du att ha en nyckelroll i att forma och driva utvecklingen av våra tekniska lösningar. Du kommer att arbeta i en dynamisk miljö där innovation, snabbhet och kundfokus är i centrum. Ditt arbete kommer att vara både strategiskt och operativt, med ansvar för att säkerställa att våra system är robusta, skalbara och framtidssäkra.
   

  

 Hos oss får du möjlighet att utforska och implementera avancerade teknologier inom AI och maskininlärning, där särskilt fokus ligger på naturlig språkbehandling (NLP), utveckling av intelligenta system, chatbotar och språkmodeller. Du kommer även att arbeta med bildigenkänning och bidra till att skapa skräddarsydda AI-lösningar som kan revolutionera vår verksamhet.
   

  

 Du blir en viktig del i att bygga en affärsagil organisation där IT och affärsverksamhet samverkar för att leverera innovativa lösningar med hög kvalitet. Rollen innebär nära samarbete med andra utvecklingsteam för att säkerställa att våra lösningar hänger ihop i en helhet, både frontend och backend.
   

  

**Dina arbetsuppgifter kommer bland annat att vara:**
* Fullstack-utveckling med .NET (version 8/9) för Azure
* Utveckling med C#
* Användning av React, TypeScript, microfrontend
* Testdriven/testfokuserad utveckling
* Integration med synkrona och asynkrona mönster
* Mjukvaruarkitektur
* Bygga och optimera CI/CD-pipelines med Azure och Azure DevOps
* Automation och användning av Bicep
* Utveckla och implementera avancerade AI-lösningar med fokus på NLP, intelligenta system och bildigenkänning
* Bygga och optimera chatbotar och språkmodeller
* Använda Python och dess ekosystem för att skapa skräddarsydda AI-lösningar
* Samarbeta med andra utvecklingsteam för att säkerställa en integrerad lösning mellan frontend och backend
* Delta i projekt som kombinerar IT och affärsverksamhet för att leverera innovativa lösningar med hög kvalitet


**Följande kommer göra dig framgångsrik i denna tjänst:**
* Erfarenhet av generativ AI och erfarhet av att ha deployat applikationer i produktion
* Erfarenhet av fullstack-utveckling med .NET (version 8/9) för Azure
* Kunskaper i C#
* Erfarenhet av React, TypeScript, microfrontend
* Erfarenhet av testdriven/testfokuserad utveckling
* Erfarenhet av integration med synkrona och asynkrona mönster
* Kunskaper i mjukvaruarkitektur
* Erfarenhet av att bygga CI/CD-pipeline med Azure som målplattform
* Erfarenhet av automation
* Kunskaper i Bicep
* Erfarenhet inom Naturlig språkbehandling (NLP) och AI-utveckling.
* Erfarenhet av att bygga och implementera chatbotar och språkmodeller.
* Kunskaper inom bildigenkänning och relaterade AI-tekniker.


**Meriterande är även om du har:**
* Erfarenhet av att leda utvecklingsteam operativt
* Försäkringskunskap
* Förståelse för försäkringsverksamhets behov av följsamhet mot regelverk
* Erfarenhet av AI/ML/NLP/Agenter
* Kunskaper i Langchain, Semantic Kernel, OpenAI Swarm eller motsvarande


 Som person är du drivande, resultatfokuserad och nyfiken. Du har förmåga att arbeta självständigt och i team, och du utmärker dig genom gott självledarskap och stark samarbetsförmåga. Du har ordning och reda och kan dokumentera på en lagom nivå.
   

  

**Kontaktuppgifter:**
 Rekryterande chef: Poja Daroui, poja.daroui@agria.se
   

  

 Facklig representant Forena: Mirek Swartz, mirek.swartz@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

 Facklig representant Akademikerföreningen: Ellinor Jatéus, ellinor.jateus@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

*Låter det spännande? Då vill vi veta mer om dig! Välkommen med din ansökan redan idag. Vi arbetar löpande med denna rekrytering och kan komma att tillsätta tjänsten innan sista ansökningsdag.*
 Agria är ett helägt dotterbolag till Länsförsäkringar och finns idag i Sverige, Norge, Finland, Danmark, Storbritannien, Tyskland, Frankrike och Irland. Vårt svenska kontor ligger på Gärdet i Stockholm, men vårt hjärta och verksamhet sträcker sig långt utanför Sveriges gränser. Med en tydlig tillväxt agenda fortsätter vi att expandera internationellt, driva innovation och utveckla digitala lösningar som gör verklig skillnad för djurägare. Ett exempel är vårt dotterbolag Agria Vet Guide, som erbjuder digital rådgivning och gör det enklare att hjälpa fler djur snabbare.
   

  

 Vi är marknadsledande i Norden inom djur- och husdjursförsäkringar, med en tydlig vision: att bli Europas mest omtyckta och pålitliga partner för djurägare. Vårt ledarskap handlar inte bara om marknadsandelar; det handlar om att skapa trygghet för både djur och människor, och att göra livet med djur enklare och roligare.

title: Azure Integrationsutvecklare med intresse för arkitektur
description:
**Var med och påverka arkitekturen av framtidens molnlösningar samtidigt som du får använda dina tekniska erfarenheter! I denna roll får du arbeta nära både kunder och kollegor för att designa, utveckla och implementera lösningar på Microsoft Azure, i både publika och privata moln.**
**Om rollen**
 Vår verksamhet inom Microsoft Azure Services växer. Idag är vi ett team på fem erfarna utvecklare och arkitekter i Stockholm, som brinner för integration, arkitektur och helheten i Azure systemlösningar. Teamet arbetar i olika projekt för våra kunder men tack vare god dialog löser vi problemen tillsammans. Hos kunderna kommer du vara delaktig i att fatta tekniska, arkitekturella beslut, för att sedan ansvara för att bygga lösningarna.
   

  

 Hela teamet ges god insyn i affärsområdets tillväxt genom bl.a. nära samarbete med kollegor och chef samt delta i rekryteringsprocessen. Tillsammans bidrar vi i utvecklingen av vårt erbjudande inom Azure-integration.
   

  

**I det dagliga arbetet kommer du att:**
* Designa arkitektur för säkra och skalbara integrationslösningar med fokus på serverless-tjänster, containerlösningar och meddelandebaserade flöden.
* Ta fram krav tillsammans med kunden och översätta dem till hållbara lösningar
* Driftsätta integrationsflöden i Microsoft Azure - till exempel med Azure API Management, Azure Functions, Logic Apps, Event Grid, Service Bus eller Integration Services.
* Arbeta med API-design, storage-lösningar, DevOps och CI/CD, samt tekniker som C#, .NET, TypeScript, JavaScript eller Java


**Vi söker dig som:**
* Har arbetslivserfarenhet av Microsoft Azure-integrationer
* Kommunicerar obehindrat på både svenska och engelska
* Förstår hur dina tekniska lösningar påverkar både verksamheten och användarna


**Meriterande teknik (du behöver inte ha allt!)**
 Har du någon av dessa tekniker i bagaget räcker det långt – vi värderar drivkraft, engagemang och viljan att skapa smarta lösningar högst.
   

  

* Erfarenhet av Infrastructure as Code, gärna med Bicep eller Terraform
* Kunskap om containerteknik som Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) eller Container Apps
* Erfarenhet av distribuerade system, eventdriven arkitektur eller moderna integrationsmönster
* Förståelse för säkerhetsdesign i molnet, t.ex. identitetshantering med Azure AD / Entra ID, Key Vault, nätverkssegmentering eller policyhantering
* Vana av loggning, övervakning och observability i Azure, t.ex. Application Insights, Log Analytics eller Monitor


**Meriter:**
* Certifiering inom Microsoft Azure
* Erfarenhet av konsultuppdrag med kravställning


**Vi erbjuder:**
**Flexibilitet & självstyre** 
 : För oss är balans mellan arbete och privatliv en hög prioritet, vilket gör att flexibla arbetstider och hemmakontor är en naturlig del av hur vi jobbar. Vi litar på att du vet hur du arbetar bäst och ger dig frihet att välja både arbetssätt och operativsystem.
   

  

**Team & teknisk miljö** 
 : Du ingår i ett team med erfarna utvecklare och arkitekter där dina erfarenheter gör verklig nytta. Du har ägandeskap över komplexa problem och tar fram lösningar som lever i produktion över tid – från design till drift.
   

  

**Karriärutveckling** 
 : Förutom att erbjuda kurser och certifikat håller vi oss uppdaterade genom konferenser och partnerskap såsom Fosdem och CNCF.
   

  

**Projekt som gör skillnad** 
 : Vi arbetar med kunder som utvecklar samhällsviktiga projekt på riktigt. Om inte du själv använder lösningarna i din vardag känner du garanterat någon som gör det.
   

  

 Låter det intressant?
   

  

**Vi ser fram emot din ansökan så hör vi av oss så snart vi kan!**
 På grund av jul- och nyårsledighet kan det dröja lite längre än vanligt till du hör från oss, men vi tar gärna emot din ansökan redan idag så hör vi av oss så snart vi kan!
   

  

 Frågor eller funderingar om rollen? Kontakta idap@redpill-linpro.com
   

  

 Redpill Linpro is the leading provider of Open Source services and products in the Nordics. We are located in seven offices with a mission to share knowledge and best practices for a more open society.
   

  

 We are passionate about open solutions, open business models, and an open society where we work together for maximum benefit to everyone. We have got some really skilled co-workers here at Redpill Linpro, particularly within our main areas: API management, development, IT operations, data analytics, customer experience, cloud, DevOps, and automation.
   

  

**May the Source be with you!**

title: Platform Engineer - Developer Experience
description:
**TL;DR** 
 We are seeking a Platform Engineer to enhance and scale Lovable's developer experience. In this role, you will be responsible for critical components of our stack, ensuring our engineering workflows are faster, smoother, and more
 **Lovable** 
 .
   

  

**Why Lovable?**
 Lovable lets anyone and everyone build software with plain English. From solopreneurs to Fortune 100 teams, millions of people use Lovable to transform raw ideas into real products - fast. We are at the forefront of a foundational shift in software creation, which means you have an unprecedented opportunity to change the way the digital world works. Over 2 million people in 200+ countries already use Lovable to launch businesses, automate work, and bring their ideas to life. And we’re just getting started.
   

  

 We’re a small, talent-dense team building a generation-defining company from Stockholm. We value extreme ownership, high velocity and low-ego collaboration. We seek out people who care deeply, ship fast, and are eager to make a dent in the world.
   

  

**What We’re Looking For**
* You have strong programming skills and a track record of improving developer velocity and system reliability.
* 7+ years of experience working in a platform team supporting developer experience (o11y, CI/CD, application frameworks, productivity tooling, etc).
* You’ve written code and tools to support growing engineering orgs in scale-ups.
* You have experience with Docker, Kubernetes and modern infrastructure practices.
* You’re a problem-solver who thrives on challenges and ships high-leverage systems fast.
* You’re comfortable navigating ambiguity and solving problems as they arise.
* You care about security, stability, and speed and know when to make trade-offs between them.
* You’re based in Stockholm or ready to relocate - this is an on-site, 5-days-a-week role.


**What You’ll Do**
**In one sentence:** 
 Own and scale the developer experience at Lovable, making our engineering teams the most productive in the world.
   

  

* Bring order and structure to our code base.
* Integrate or build application frameworks to support a growing engineering organization and code footprint
* Own and develop our observability stack, from code instrumentation through ingestion to presentation.
* Integrating tools for AI driven development.
* Identify and drive reliability improvement efforts across all engineering teams.


**Our tech stack**
 We're building with tools that both humans and AI love. Lovable platform engineers are capable of working across the whole stack. Examples of tech in our stack include:
   

  

* Frontend: React and Typescript.
* Backend: Golang and Rust.
* Cloud: Cloudflare, GCP, AWS, Modal.
* Data: Clickhouse, Firestore, Spanner, BigQuery.
* DevOps Tooling: CI/CD pipelines, OTEL, Grafana, kubernetes, terraform.
* Local Tooling: Nix, DevEnv.


 And always on the lookout for what's next!
   

  

**About Your Application**
* Please submit your application in English - it’s our company language so you’ll be speaking lots of it if you join
* We treat all candidates equally - if you’re interested please apply through our careers portal

title: Android utvecklare - PostNord App, Solna/Hybrid
description:
Vill du göra vardagen enklare för våra nordiska användare?
   

  

 PostNord Customer Solutions söker en talangfull och passionerad Android-utvecklare till vårt produktteam för PostNord App. Som Android-utvecklare kommer du att ingå i vårt team som ansvarar för att designa, utveckla och underhålla PostNord App och ge våra användare en enastående användarupplevelse. Du kommer att arbeta i vårt tvärfunktionella team av designers, produktägare, QA, och utvecklare för att skapa innovativa lösningar. Vi letar efter någon som vill påverka och ser till våra miljontals användares behov.
   

  

 Som Teammedlem Kommer Du Få Samarbeta Med Hela Produktteamet För Att Implementera Lösningar Och Säkerställa Bästa Möjliga Produktupplevelse. Detta Kommer Du Göra Genom Att
   

  

* Skriva ren, underhållbar och effektiv kod, men framförallt gillar du att lösa problem och utforska möjliga vägar framåt.
* Hålla dig uppdaterad med de senaste industritrenderna, teknikerna och bästa praxis.
* Vara delaktig i att förbättra utvecklingsprocesser och påverka val av verktyg.
* Genomföra grundliga tester för att identifiera och åtgärda buggar och prestandaproblem.
* Utveckla ny funktionalitet likväl som att jobba med hela produktlivscykeln.
* Som person är du engagerad, ansvarsfull och prestigelös och vill vara involverad och påverka produkten i det stora.
* Du har examen i datavetenskap, programvaruteknik eller ett närliggande område.
* Du har omkring 5 års erfarenhet av att utveckla Android-applikationer. Du kan Kotlin från grunden och har åtminstone experimenterat med Kotlin Multiplatform.
* Har erfarenhet av moderna Android-ramverk, såsom Jetpack, MVVM och Android Architecture Components.
* Du har gedigen förståelse för Android SDK, designmönster och bästa praxis.
* Bekantskap med RESTful API:er och integrationer mot webbtjänster.
* Har erfarenhet av automatiserade testsystem.
* Förståelse för agila utvecklingsmetoder och utmärkt kommunikations- och samarbetsförmåga.
* Svenska och engelska i tal och skrift.


**Vi erbjuder dig**
* Flexibel hybrid arbetsplats med ett öppet arbetsklimat.
* Goda utvecklings- och karriärmöjligheter,till exempel sponsrar vi dig att AWS-certifiera dig.
* Goda försäkrings- och tjänstepensionsvillkor.
* Friskvårdsbidrag och tillgång till kontoret Arkens gym och pool.
* Personalförmåner genom PostNords egen personalstiftelse PostNord Plus.
* Anställning sker enligt kollektivavtal.


**Vi gör vardagen enklare**
 PostNord är den ledande leverantören av kommunikations- och logistiklösningar till, från och inom Norden. Vi säkerställer postservicen till privatpersoner och företag i Sverige och Danmark. Vi strävar efter att göra vardagen enklare och mer hållbar för alla som bor och arbetar i Norden. Vi är ansvarstagande, modiga och engagerade, och leder effektivt förändring oavsett om vi leder oss själva eller andra. Vi uppmuntrar lagarbete, uppriktighet och positiva relationer på arbetsplatsen. Vi bygger vidare på våra framgångar och lär oss av både kollegor och misstag. Människor med olika bakgrund arbetar hos oss. Du kommer därför vara en del av en arbetsplats med stor mångfald, vilket bidrar till bättre resultat för verksamheten. Besök oss på www.postnord.com.
   

  

**Ansök**
 Vad väntar du på? Välkommen med din ansökan. Urval sker löpande så ansök så snart som möjligt. Om du undrar något över tjänsten, maila gustav.forsberg@postnord.com. Vi ser fram emot att höra från dig!

title: Lead Fullstackutvecklare – var med och utveckla produkter hos Sigma Industry Development
description:
Hos Sigma Industry Development handlar det inte bara om att skriva kod – vi är med och utvecklar produkter. Som Senior Fullstackutvecklare blir du en viktig del av produktresan: från idé och arkitektur till utveckling, testning och leverans. Här bidrar du till hela produktens livscykel och får möjlighet att påverka både teknikval och slutresultat.
   

  

 Vi söker dig som vill ta klivet från ”bygga webbsidor” till att faktiskt vara med i utvecklingen av produkter som används i verkligheten – i allt från fordonsindustrin till smarta digitala tjänster.
   

  

 Som Senior Fullstackutvecklare kommer du framför allt att arbeta med frontendutveckling men också bidra på backend-sidan. Du kommer att:
   

  

  

* Utveckla moderna, skalbara och användarvänliga frontend-lösningar i React, HTML, CSS och TypeScript/JavaScript
* Säkerställa webbläsarkompatibilitet och hög prestanda
* Bidra till backend-utveckling i Node.js när det behövs, för att knyta ihop helheten
* Vara med i hela produktresan: design, utveckling, testning och leverans
* Bygga och förvalta CI/CD-pipelines för smidiga produktreleaser
* Arbeta i agila team (Scrum/Kanban) med fokus på produktutveckling
* Bidra till arkitekturval och långsiktig produktstrategi


**Krav:**
* Minst 5 års professionell erfarenhet av programmering, med tyngd på frontend (React/TypeScript/JavaScript)
* Goda kunskaper inom Node.js och förmåga att bidra i backend-utveckling
* Vana av Git/GitLab och moderna utvecklingsflöden
* Algoritmiskt och analytiskt tänkande – du gillar att knäcka komplexa problem
* Förståelse för mjukvarudesignmönster och testdriven utveckling
* Flytande svenska och engelska, både skriftligt och muntligt
* Har en akademisk examen (B.Sc. eller M.Sc.) inom Datavetenskap, Elektroteknik, IT eller liknande område


**Meriterande om du:**
* Har erfarenhet från fordonsindustrin eller liknande branscher
* Är engagerad i open source-projekt eller driver egna tekniska projekt – vi älskar utvecklare som lever och andas kod även utanför arbetstid


**Vi erbjuder**
 Vi är stora nog för att kunna erbjuda en bred kundbas och vi har ett gott rykte i branschen, samtidigt som vi är små nog att se dig som individ. För oss är gemenskap viktigt – här ska alla känna sig sedda och välkomna. Som en följd av detta har vi bland annat gemensamma sektionsaktiviteter, ett nätverk för kvinnor och icke-binära, ett mentorskapsprogam och utbildningar inom olika kompetensområden. Vi strävar efter att skapa en miljö där alla kan växa och utvecklas tillsammans.
   

  

 Vår ambition är att tillgodose konsultens önskemål gällande uppdragslängd, sektor och arbetsuppgifter. För oss är en bra balans mellan arbete och privatliv en självklarhet och vi är stolta över att vara en av Sveriges mest attraktiva arbetsgivare. Givetvis har vi också kollektivavtal.
   

  

 Nyfiken på hur det känns att vara en del av vårt gäng? I den här filmen delar några av våra medarbetare med sig av sina tankar om vardagen, gemenskapen och varför de valt just oss:
 **https://vimeo.com/1058313176?share=copy#t=0**
**OM SID**
 Sigma Industry Development är ett teknik- och konsultbolag inom Sigmagruppen som hjälper både ledande svenska och internationella teknikföretag och innovativa och nytänkande start-ups och scale-ups. Vi verkar inom sektorer så som den gröna energisektorn, fordonsindustrin, transportindustrin, medtech, försvarsbranchen och hållbarhet.
   

  

 Vår vision är att vara det ledande teknikkonsultbolaget och vår kultur präglas av familjär samhörighet där människan är i centrum. Med över 100 engagerade medarbetare är vi i en stark tillväxtfas. Vår kärnverksamhet ligger i konsultuppdrag ute hos kund, men vi har även ett in-house-team som arbetar uteslutande från kontoret. Precis som vårt namn antyder, är utveckling kärnan i allt vi gör och våra medarbetare engageras av att ta Sigma Industry Development till nästa nivå.
   

  

**OM SIGMA GROUP**
 Sigma Industry Development AB (SID) är ett av sex dotterbolag som ingår i koncernen Sigma Industry East/North Group, vilka i sin tur ingår i Sigma Group (som ägs av familjekoncernen Danir AB). Läs mer om Sigma Industry Development
 **HÄR** 
 och om Sigma Group på
 **HÄR** 
 .
   

  

 Utöver att vara del av ett företag som värnar om teknologisk utveckling, arbetar för en bättre miljö och som främjar jämställdhet, så är en viktig del av vår verksamhet socialt ansvarstagande. Mer information om detta hittar du
 **HÄR** 
 .
   

  

 Start: Så snart som möjligt.
   

  

 Vi rekryterar löpande, så skicka in din ansökan redan idag!
   

  

 Plats: Stockholm, Marievik
   

  

 Sista ansökningsdag
   

  

 2026-04-30
   

  

 MER INFORMATION
   

  

 För mer information kontakta:
   

  

 Magdalena Hildan
   

  

 Magdalena.Hildan@sigma.se

title: Senior software developer BIM, AEC
description:
**Stockholm/Göteborg/Malmö**




**Tills vidare**




**Hybrid**









***Om AEC***





 AEC är ett produkt- och konsultbolag inom digital transformation i samhällsbyggnadssektorn. Vi kombinerar egenutvecklad mjukvara, marknadsledande tredjepartsplattformar (bl.a.Autodesk, Bluebeam, Febdok m.m.) och kvalificerade konsulttjänster inom systemintegration, BIM/CAD och processtöd. Vår långsiktiga ambition är att vara Nordens ledande partner för digital transformation.
   

  






**Senior software developer inom BIM**





 Vill du vara med och bygga nästa generations digitala verktyg för bygg- och infrastruktur-sektorn? AEC befinner sig just nu på en tillväxtresa där vi ökar vår förmåga att leverera smarta och effektiva produkter till marknaden och söker därför en nyckelspelare i arbetet med att:
 



* skala våra produkter nationellt och internationellt


* göra våra produkter än mer konkurrenskraftiga
* säkerställa att produkterna är användarvänliga, tillförlitliga och kommersiellt hållbara




  

 Som Senior software developer inom BIM är du inte bara utvecklare – du är med och bygger affären med oss!
   

  

**Rollen**






 Som Senior software developer inom BIM på AEC får du en central roll i ett växande produktbolag där innovation, skalbarhet och praktisk nytta går hand i hand. Här arbetar du i skärningspunkten mellan BIM/CAD-plattformar, automation, AI och modern systemutveckling. Du är med och förvandlar branschens komplexa behov till smarta, användarvänliga och hållbara mjukvarulösningar.
   

  

  

  







 I rollen blir du en viktig del av vårt produktteam där du både utvecklar nya funktioner, förbättrar befintliga lösningar och säkerställer att våra produkter håller hög kvalitet, stabilitet och kommersiell relevans. Du kommer att jobba nära både produktägare, konsulter och kundteam och bidrar i hela kedjan: från behovsanalys och MVP‑arbete till integrationer, dokumentation, test och förvaltning. Tillsammans skapar vi riktigt bra verktyg som gör skillnad för tusentals användare i deras dagliga arbete.
   

  







 Du kommer bland annat att få arbeta med:
 



* produktutveckling, add‑ins, integrationer och moln-API:er med fokus på .NET/C#, Revit/AutoCAD API, IFC och andra BIM‑standarder
* automation, arbetsflödesoptimering och kopplingar mellan designverktyg och plattformar som ACC, ProjectWise och Vault



**Vem är du?**

 Vi tror att du är en strukturerad och kvalitetsmedveten utvecklare som trivs i en miljö där teknik möter affär och där du får mycket förtroende och stort handlingsutrymme. Du är nyfiken på hur bygg- och infrastrukturområdet digitaliseras, van att ta ansvar och gillar att förbättra både kod, processer och användarupplevelse. Har du dessutom erfarenhet av plugin‑utveckling, BIM‑standarder eller branscherfarenhet är det ett stort plus.
   

  







 Extra värdefullt är om du har:
 



* erfarenhet av bygg-/infrastrukturbranschen, BIM-standarder eller Autodesk‑relaterad utveckling
* bakgrund inom produktutveckling där långsiktig förvaltning, skalning och kundvärde står i centrum




  

 Du är utbildad högskole- eller civilingenjör inom mjukvarutveckling och har arbetat 5 år eller mer inom området. Din erfarenhet är främst mjukvaruutveckling inom digital projektering/tidiga skeden/förvaltning inom samhällsplanering såsom infrastruktur- och/eller byggsektorn.
   

  







 På AEC blir du en del av ett team som uppskattar nytänkande, samarbete och en vilja att skapa riktigt bra digitala verktyg. Här får du möjlighet att påverka tekniska val, driva utveckling framåt och bidra till en bransch i snabb förändring.
   

  






**Är du intresserad?**





 Det hoppas vi! Vi tar gärna emot din ansökan så snart som möjligt. Vi gör löpande urval så vänta inte med att visa ditt intresse. Observera att vi inte får ta emot CV:n via mail p.g.a GDPR så använd ansökningslänken.
   

  

 Om du har några frågor om rollen är du välkommen att kontakta rekryterande chef Christian Stjernquist, Head of Products på
 

 cnst@aec.se
 

 . Har du frågor om rekryteringsprocessen, kontakta gärna TA Specialist Sarah Wallentin på
 

 srwa@cowi.com
 

 .
   

  






**Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!**

title: Product Manager
description:
Are you our next Product Manager?
  
As a Product Manager, you will work closely with engineering, design, and data to continuously improve our storefront experience. This is a hands-on role with a strong focus on execution, delivery, and learning through iteration, working alongside an experienced e-commerce team.
  
You will take clear strategic direction and priorities and translate them into concrete product improvements. Over time, the role offers the opportunity to grow in scope and responsibility as you build context, product judgment, and ownership.
  
Your mission is to help make shopping with Photowall clearer, smoother, and more effective - from navigation to checkout - while learning what truly drives customer value in a high-impact e-commerce environment.
  
As a Product Manager you belong with the Product team in our Growth-department. The Product team consists of two developers and one product designer, and is being led by our Chief Growth Officer. You will of course work in close collaboration with both marketing and data teams, ensuring alignment across initiatives and leveraging insights to drive product decisions.
  
Key Responsibilities
  
Own the execution of customer-facing product initiatives for the storefront
  
Translate business priorities into clear product requirements and delivery plans
  
Work closely with frontend developers and UX/design to deliver high-quality solutions
  
Plan, run, and analyze A/B tests and experiments
  
Use data and user insights to identify and prioritize improvements
  
Coordinate multiple initiatives in parallel and ensure timely delivery
  
Follow up after launch to measure impact, document learnings, and iterate
  
  

Requirements
  
  

4–6 years of experience as a Product Manager or Product Owner in digital products or e-commerce
  
Proven ability to deliver end-to-end product improvements independently
  
Experience working closely with engineering and design teams
  
Experience creating detailed user stories and technical tickets for engineering teams
  
Experience in e-commerce
  
Analytical mindset, with experience using data, funnels, and experiment results
  
Structured and reliable, with strong follow-through
  
Familiarity with experimentation and analytics tools
  
Interest in UX, personalization, and customer journey optimization
  
  

About Photowall
  
At Photowall, we are more than just a global leader in custom-made wallpapers and wall murals -we’re passionate about transforming spaces and bringing design to life. With a presence in over 20 markets we’re on an exciting journey of growth. Our vision is to keep expanding, both geographically and through innovative new products. As proud members of the Network of Design (NOD), we are constantly pushing the boundaries of interior design to create inspiring and meaningful spaces.
  
Here you’ll have the chance to shape our future and influence the development of our technical platform, all while working in a company that’s committed to the ever-evolving world of interior design. If you’re passionate about design and eager to grow, Photowall is the place for you. We can’t wait to welcome you aboard as a key player in our exciting journey!
  
Apply today and help us shape the future of design at Photowall!

title: Testare
description:
Milou är en strategisk och kreativ fullservicebyrå präglad av lång erfarenhet från relationer i gränslandet mellan affärer - kommunikation - teknik. Varje dag skapar vi starka varumärken, smart teknisk funktionalitet, kreativ marknadsföring, användarvänlig design och effektiv digital närvaro. För att fortsätta göra det söker vi en nyfiken testare till någon av våra studios i Karlskrona, Kalmar eller Kristianstad!
  
Vad kommer du att göra i rollen som Testare?
  
  

Planera, skapa, estimera, genomföra, följa upp och utföra omtester.
  
  

Arbeta strategiskt och operativt i nära dialog med kunder och projektteam.
  
  

Ta fram testfall utifrån framtagna krav och designsspecifikationer samt följa upp kravuppfyllnad.
  
  

Granska och objektivt bedöma avvikelser, samt säkerställa samsyn och förståelse hos berörda parter och teamet.
  
  

Rapportera testresultat och hålla testdokumentation uppdaterad.
  
  

Vem är du? Du är en kreativ problemlösare och relationsbyggare som arbetar självgående, strukturerat och ansvarstagande med hela testarbetet, från ax till limpa. Du är kommunikativ och vill ha en bred roll där du får samarbeta med en rad olika kunder i nya kontexter.
  
  

**Vi ser även att du har:**  

Cirka 2 års erfarenhet i en liknande roll inom testning.
  
  

Erfarenhet av att testa med personas som representerar projektets målanvändare.
  
  

Kunskap om olika testmetoder (t.ex. utforskande testning, UI/UX-test, funktionstestning och acceptanstest).
  
  

Varför Milou?
  
  

Spännande projekt och uppdrag från kunder inom en stor bredd av branscher och storlekar.
  
  

Du är en del av hela utvecklingsprocessen och jobbar i sammansvetsade Milou-team med bland annat utvecklare, projektledare och UI/UX-designers.
  
  

Verktyg och arbetsredskap efter dina behov och preferenser.
  
  

Individuellt anpassad kompetensutveckling och aktiv kunskapsdelning med kollegor.
  
  

Generösa förmåner som bl.a. 6 veckors semester, tjänstepension, rekryteringsbonus och friskvårdsbidrag.
  
  

Flexibla arbetsmöjligheter med möjlighet att jobba hemifrån ett par dagar i veckan.
  
  

… och med ett härligt gäng som dina kollegor!
  
  

Är du intresserad av att lära känna oss bättre? Då ser vi fram emot din ansökan! För att läsa mer om vilka vi är och vad vi gör, besök oss gärna på www.milou.se.

title: Product Manager (Asset Management)
description:
*Be part of the team that makes circular technology happen*

 **PRODUCT MANAGER (Asset Management)**

**Location:** Helsinki, Finland or Stockholm, Sweden

**We are 3stepIT**


3stepIT is a global leader in circular technology management. We are helping organizations use technology smarter and more sustainably. For nearly 30 years, we’ve designed lifecycle solutions that finance, manage, reuse, and extend the value of technology — reducing waste and driving business impact.


We work at the intersection of technology, sustainability, and innovation. Our teams help customers boost productivity while building a more circular future.
  

  

Want to help shape the future of circular technology? Join us.

**Product Manager**


Reporting to: Director Product Management

**Job role and purpose:**  

At 3stepIT, we believe technology should empower progress and performance. Our IT Asset Management platform IQ helps organizations take control of the entire device lifecycle, making technology use smarter, more cost-effective, and sustainable.


We’re now looking for a Product Manager who will lead the strategic development and execution of our asset management products and services that meet customer needs, drive business growth, and ensure we stay ahead in a fast-evolving market.


As a Product Manager, you will take ownership of the full product & service lifecycle - from planning to release management - ensuring that our offerings are commercially successful, profitable, and with a high attach rate. You’ll work cross-functionally with technology, sales, and marketing teams to strengthen our portfolio and boost adoption across markets.

**Main responsibilities & tasks:**

**Product & Service Strategy and Roadmap:**


Develop and communicate a clear product and service vision and strategy aligned with business objectives and market needs


Define the roadmap and prioritize features based on customer feedback, market research, and technological trends

**Product & Service Development and Execution:**


Define requirements, user stories, and acceptance criteria


Prioritization of development plan and ensuring timely delivery of high-quality features and functionalities

**Stakeholder Management:**


Engage with key stakeholders including executives, customers, partners, and internal teams to gather requirements, provide updates, and address concerns


Build strong relationships and manage expectations to gain support for product and services initiatives

**Cross-Functional Collaboration:**


Work closely with sales, marketing, and customer support teams to ensure success, profitability and adoption


Collaborate with software developers, UX/UI designers, engineers, and other stakeholders to drive development from concept to launch

**Launch and Go-to-Market Strategy:**


Plan and execute launches, including developing go-to-market strategies, messaging, and positioning


Partner with marketing and sales teams to drive product awareness, demand generation, and customer acquisition

**Performance Monitoring and Optimization:**


Define and track key performance indicators to measure product and service success, identify areas for improvement


Use analytics tools to monitor user behavior and gather insights for continuous optimization

**Market Research and Analysis:**


Conduct market research, competitive analysis, and customer interviews to identify market opportunities and user needs


Use data-driven insights to make informed decisions and validate product hypotheses

 **Qualifications and experience:**

* Bachelor's degree or equivalent in a related field or equivalent training in IT, business, financing or sales related field
* 5+ years of proven experience as a Product Manager in industries such as Technology Lifecycle Services, Fintech, Payments, Insurance, or Telecom. This role requires solid knowledge of financial services, preferably with experience in the leasing domain.
* Product & Service Lifecycle management: Strong product management skills to oversee product development cycles, timelines, and deliverables.
* Strategic Thinking: Ability to think strategically and translate business goals into actionable product roadmaps and features.
* Commercial Acumen: Understanding of business and financial metrics related to product success, such as revenue, profitability, and ROI.
* Communication Skills: Strong verbal and written communication skills to articulate ideas, present plans, and collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams.
* Stakeholder Management: Experience in managing relationships with stakeholders, customers, executives, and development teams to align priorities and expectations.
* Leadership and Influence: Ability to lead and motivate cross-functional teams without direct authority, driving consensus and alignment towards common goals.
* Customer Approach: Deep understanding of customer needs and pain points, with a focus on delivering value and enhancing user satisfaction.
* Problem-Solving and Decision-Making: Strong analytical and problem-solving skills to address complex challenges, prioritize tasks, and make informed decisions under uncertainty.
* Negotiation Skills: Proficiency in negotiation to manage trade-offs, resolve conflicts, and advocate for product priorities.
**Why should you join us**


We want you to able to Be Your Best in your job – and we will support you in this. We’re a community that supports each other and works together to get things done. Collaboration is at the heart of how we operate: people and leaders are easy to approach and engaged, and fresh ideas are always welcomed.


Our culture is friendly, forward-thinking, and focused on helping you grow. Here, you’ll have room to develop, contribute to something bigger, and feel recognized for the impact you make every day.

**And what´s in it for you?**

* Recognition & Rewards – Bonus programs and excellence awards.
* Continuous Learning – Development programs, coaching, and workshops.
* Wellbeing Focus – Flexible culture, health initiatives, and work-life balance.
* Purpose-Driven Work – Opportunities to contribute to sustainability and community projects.
* Fun & Connection – Team challenges, sports activities, and annual events.
**Contact details:**


For more information, please contact Talent Acquisition Partner Noora Forss via email (noora.forss(at)3stepit.com).

**Closing date:**


Please submit your application by Sun 5.4.2026 through our career page. We look forward to hearing from you!


Locations
Helsinki, Stockholm
Remote status
Hybrid
**About 3stepIT**
-----------------

  

  

**Technology Lifecycle Management**


In 1997 we broke the mould when it came to IT procurement, management, and disposal. We saw the need for businesses to get more out of their IT, and to do it sustainably. And for over 20 years, we’ve helped businesses to embrace the circular economy model and have saved millions of devices going to landfill and tons of carbon emissions.  

  

We’re proud to manage millions of assets and thousands of clients in countries across the globe. Which all means you can trust that we’re not only true experts at what we do, but that we’re also the ultimate safe, trusted pair of hands when it comes to the acquisition, management, and refresh of your IT devices.


Founded in 1997

title: Senior UX Designer
description:
As a Senior UX Designer at BookBeat, you will focus on improving how users discover, sign up, and fall in love with our service. This means working hands-on across the full funnel — from first impression and onboarding to payment and retention.


You’ll be part of the Conversion team, working closely with developers, CRO specialists, product and marketing in a highly data-driven environment where ideas quickly turn into features and experiments.


This is a role with real ownership and impact: your work directly affects how many users choose to start and stay with BookBeat.


The Conversion team is responsible for developing BookBeat’s user acquisition platform on the web, user offers, retention, payment solutions, user account handling and customer support platforms. We work cross-functionally with teams across BookBeat, with the marketing teams across our markets as our key stakeholders.

**The role includes, among other things, to:**

* Own and improve key user journeys across our web platforms
* Identify user needs through research, data analysis and experimentation together with the team
* Design user journeys that are intuitive, inclusive and accessible for all users
* Ensure a cohesive and consistent design of our web platforms
* Turn insights into hypotheses and drive continuous optimization
* Facilitate workshops and collaborate with stakeholders across teams

**We are looking for someone who:**

* Has at least 4 years of experience in UX design, in a B2C environment
* Has a good understanding of accessibility standards and inclusive design
* Has experience working closely with product, developers and marketing
* Is used to working with experimentation (A/B testing is a plus)
* Communicates clearly and enjoys collaborating with others
* Is fluent in Swedish and English


Are you ready to take on the role of our new Senior UX Designer in the Conversion Team? Apply today! If you have any questions, please contact our Chief Business Development Officer william.jakoby@bookbeat.com.

**As an employee of BookBeat AB, you can enjoy a benefit package that includes the following:**


30 days of vacation each year  

ITP1 occupational pension  

Occupational group life insurance, work injury insurance & business travel insurance  

Yearly wellness allowance  

‍️ Weekly wellness hour  

Working equipment (computer and phone) as well as phone subscription  

BookBeat subscription  

Occupational health services to ensure your well-being  

Parental leave benefits to support your growing family  

 Collective agreement

**In addition to our benefits, we’ll also provide you with:**


A stable and sustainable work-life balance. We use flex time and work 37,9 hours a week  

An office located in the heart of Stockholm  

‍️ … including access to a full gym complete with a sauna! We also arrange other fun wellness activities, such as our own running club  

The opportunity to grow in your role and career, including challenging & educational work tasks as well as opportunities for education  

Fun activities together with colleagues! At BookBeat you’ll enjoy weekly Friday afternoon mingles, monthly company breakfasts and other work events such as Holiday & summer parties, and frequent company wide events.  

The opportunity to explore projects that you might not have time to do in your day-to-day work during Hack Days  

Knowledge sharing opportunities, e.g. during our weekly Friday demo where different teams share what they’ve been or will be working on. Knowledge sharing is also an integral part of our everyday work  

The opportunity to bring your furry dog friend to work (and cuddle with dogs at work)! We have recently introduced a dog room at our Stockholm office  

(Last but definitely not least) A wonderful and skilled team and manager that will support you throughout your employment!

**About us**  

In 2015, we began our journey towards the goal of offering Europe’s leading service for digital books and in 2016, we launched to the public. Now, about 10 years since our broad launch, BookBeat is used by over 1 million users every month. We are an ever-growing company within the Bonnier Group and all members who join our journey have the possibility to make an impact on our development – both in the short and long run.


Today, Team BookBeat consists of around 170 curious and committed doers. Are you interested in becoming part of our team? Wonderful! While our employees are experts at many different areas, we have four core values uniting all of us:

  

Be great at what you do  

Share what you know  

Curiosity for our users and us  

Build Team BookBeat


In other words: we want our employees to continuously deep dive into and develop within their area(s) of expertise, but also to share that knowledge with their colleagues – we’re all in this together and cooperate (most often a lot) on a daily basis! We’re also looking for employees who are genuinely curious about our users, journey and organization, a curiosity that drives us to always test out new things in our service and to let our users show us if we’re on the right track. Last but definitely not least we want all our employees to contribute to the everyday cooperations and the wellbeing of Team BookBeat – as already mentioned, we’re in this together and we want our team to be healthy and happy at work, and we all contribute to this in different ways.

title: Innovation Lead / Senior Project Manager R&D Getinge
description:
Innovation Lead / Senior Project Manager R&D Getinge


**Date:** Apr 2, 2026
**Location:**Stockholm, SE
**Company:** Maquet Critical Care AB
**Remote Work:****With a passion for life**  

Join our diverse teams of passionate people and a career that allows you to develop both personally and professionally. At Getinge we exist to make life-saving technology accessible for more people. To make a true difference for our customers – and to save more lives, we need team players, forward thinkers, and game changers.
Are you looking for an inspiring career? You just found it.  



We are looking for an Innovation Lead / Senior Project Manager to drive innovation projects from early concept to validated solutions ready for R&D development and implementation.

This role sits at the interface of innovation, R&D, and business, ensuring ideas are matured, tested, and structured so they can be successfully taken forward into formal development.  


**What you will do**
* Lead end-to-end innovation and early-phase development projects, from pre-study and concept to validated and transferable outcomes
* Drive technical pre-studies and feasibility investigations for next-generation products and functions
* Lead concept development, rapid prototyping, and iterative design cycles
* Translate exploration into clear actions, priorities, decisions, and concrete deliverables
* Apply and further develop Technology Readiness Levels (TRL) to structure maturity and progression
* Build, shape, and lead truly cross-functional teams across R&D, product, and business, ensuring alignment, shared ownership, and clear communication
* Drive complex technical work by actively engaging in and structuring advanced technical problem-solving
* Demonstrate strong technical leadership, including clear decision-making in uncertain and complex environments
* Facilitate cross-functional teams of experts and lead in a complex organization
* Ensure quality, regulatory compliance, and risk management throughout all phases
* Drive and ensure successful handover into R&D development, including ownership of process alignment, ways of working, and readiness for implementation

  


**Who you are**

You combine technical depth with strong execution capability and are comfortable working in complex, regulated environments. You bring strong technical leadership, with the ability to understand, challenge, and guide advanced technical topics while enabling teams to deliver. You are comfortable making decisions and driving progress in complex environments  


**What you bring**
* MSc or PhD in Engineering or a relevant field
* 8+ years of experience from medtech R&D or other regulated industries, preferably medical device or critical care products
* Solid experience in product development of complex, integrated (embedded) systems, with strong understanding of the full development lifecycle
* Proven experience leading cross-functional technology development
* Strong stakeholder management and cross-company collaboration skills
* Experience working as a facilitator of experts
* Experience or strong understanding of TRL frameworks is highly valued
* Fluency in Swedish and English, written and spoken


Great if you also have experience in:
* Concept development and rapid prototyping
* Iterative design and design reviews
* Customer workflows and UX validation
* Experience or strong understanding of simulation and modeling

  


**What makes you successful**

You demonstrate strong technical leadership and the ability to go deep into complex technical domains when needed. You turn ideas into structured outcomes that others can build on. You combine a pragmatic approach with strong structure and methodological rigor and a strong focus on quality and continuous improvement.  


**Why this role matters**

You will play a key role in ensuring that innovation efforts result in robust, innovative solutions that can be successfully developed into future products within Critical Care.  


**Application**

Applications will be reviewed continually, and we therefore recommend sending us your application as soon as possible, but no later than 2026-05-02

We kindly ask you to submit your application in our recruitment system by clicking the “apply now” button. Due to GDPR regulations we do not accept applications via e-mail.

If you have any questions regarding the role, please contact Hiring Manager Olga Malmberg at olga.malmberg@getinge.com or Talent Partner Emma Paulsson at emma.paulsson@getinge.com.

We look forward to receiving your application. We hope you will join us on our journey to become the world’s most desired MedTech company.  


**About us**With a firm belief that every person and community should have access to the best possible care, Getinge provides hospitals and life science institutions with products and solutions aiming to improve clinical results and optimize workflows. The offering includes products and solutions for intensive care, cardiovascular procedures, operating rooms, sterile reprocessing and life science. Getinge employs over 12,000 people worldwide and the products are sold in more than 135 countries.  


Reasonable accommodations are available upon request for candidates taking part in all aspects of the selection process.
company_description: Getinge is a global leading supplier of innovative medtech products and solutions within healthcare and life science.

title: Digital Content & AI Specialist (Project Assignment)
description:
**Who we believe you are**


You are a skilled communicator with 2–5 years of professional experience across digital channels and formats. With a background from an agency, consulting, or a well-known organization, you have experience as a Digital Communicator, Content Manager, Art Director, Motion Graphic Designer, or UX Writer. You excel in stakeholder management and identifying customer needs. You hold a degree in media, communication, digital design, or data. Fluency in Swedish and professional English is required.


You are an initiative-taking digital doer with a strategic, AI-first mindset. You work independently, take ownership of your role, and adapt quickly to the dynamics of large organizations. As a creative problem solver, you enjoy both independent work and collaborating with a team to bounce ideas.


Your technical curiosity drives you to explore new tools and smarter ways of working. You are a "learn-by-doing" person who understands how AI enhances content creation and transforms marketing processes. You navigate complex platforms with ease and enjoy experimenting with automation and new digital workflows.


You thrive in environments characterized by rapid change. You are insight-driven, explorative, and focus on communication goals and customer value. Your curiosity allows you to apply your skills in new contexts and grow through varied assignments.


You are available for project-based employment for an initial 3–6 months, with the potential for extension up to 12 months. The monthly salary range is SEK 32,000–43,000, depending on experience and the scope of the assignment.

**Requirements**

* 2–5 years of multi-channel experience from an agency or corporate environment.
* Relevant education in media, communication, digital design, or data.
* Strong written and visual communication skills.
* Hands-on experience with AI tools such as Google Gemini, Claude code, OpenAI/ChatGPT, Midjourney, and Leonardo AI.
* An AI-first, automation-oriented, and highly adaptive mindset.
* Fluency in Swedish and professional English.

**In our assignments, you can expect to:**

* Plan, coordinate, and take responsibility for our clients’ presence in digital channels.
* Produce and optimize written and visual content, including publishing and follow-up.
* Act as an advisor and hands-on specialist in digital communication, AI, and automated workflows.
* Participate in digital projects to optimize content operations and ways of working.

**What Curious Mind can offer you**


We’re content consultants born in the digital era driven by strategy, thoughtful production, and a passion for innovation. With us, you’ll enjoy a varied professional life at a company that values expertise, personality, and genuine connection. If you’re curious and driven by growth, you’ll feel right at home here.


Some of what we’re offering you:

* Access to a support system of experts and personal coaches
* A culture that actively promotes caring and supportive leadership
* Competitive compensation package
* Access to Eidra’s network of specialists, from brand strategy to tech development


If you have any questions, please contact Ville Krantz, ville.krantz@curiousmind.se. And if you would like to know more about Curious Mind, please feel free to visit our website. We interview on an ongoing basis.

title: Senior UI Designer
description:
*If you’re looking to make the best co-op games in the world, you’ve come to the right place. We're proud to have some of the best game makers and collaborators in the industry working with us. What's more, we're a fun bunch of game developers, who love to indulge in our passion for video games together. Our games are not for everyone. Are they for you?*

**We are now looking for a Senior UI Designer**
-----------------------------------------------

 ***We are looking for a Senior UI Designer to join the Helldivers 2 team. In this role, you will design, improve and lead the development of intuitive, accessible and immersive UI systems., Your work will ensure clarity in and out of chaotic combat scenarios without breaking immersion.***


Join us in creating the world's best co-op games!

##### **Who you are:**


We're looking for someone who is friendly and collaborative, but also hardworking, efficient, and dedicated to the game development craft! You thrive in a fast-paced environment and take ownership of your work.

* At least 5 years of experience in a similar role within the games industry (AA or AAA).
* Proven experience designing and implementing high-quality, intuitive UI systems.
* A strong understanding of UX principles and best practices in game UI design.
* The ability to work independently and take responsibility for your work.
* Experience designing UI for co-op or live service games.
* A collaborative mindset and experience working in a multinational team.
* Strong communication skills with a cooperative attitude.
* Excellent written and spoken English skills.

**What you'll do**


As a Senior UI Designer, you will:

* Lead the design of complex, high-impact UI systems such as HUD, inventory management, strategy planning interfaces, or social menus.
* Drive the UI design workflow from wireframing and prototyping to creating art assets and supporting in implementation within the current UI design ecosystem.
* Collaborate closely with game designers, artists, and engineers to ensure cohesive and functional UI solutions.
* Ensure UI systems align with the overall creative vision in a live service game.
* Optimize UI assets for performance, accessibility, and a seamless user experience.
* Contribute to UI-related discussions in design meetings and actively influence decision-making.


At Arrowhead, every team member has a meaningful impact on the game and is involved in key decisions.

##### **How to apply**


If you think that this position matches your background and skills, we would love to hear from you. Please submit your CV in English as soon as possible. We ask that your application always include relevant work samples or a link to your portfolio.


We interview candidates continuously and hire when we find a good fit.

##### **Practical Information**

**Scope:** Full-time: 40 hours per week with initial 6 month probation period.  

**Location:** Office first, hybrid solution possible. You need to be eligible to work in Sweden.

 **We are a pet friendly office! You can expect to find dogs and occasionally some cats around.**

##### **What we offer**


Arrowhead Game Studios is a growing team of about 140+ people, best known for our co-op titles. Despite our size, we remain a friendly and down to earth bunch, who love to indulge in our passion for video games together.


Located in the heart of Södermalm, in Fatburen in the middle of the Game Dev scene we enjoy everything Stockholm has to offer. The is a a lot of different types of activities immediately available on our doorstep.


Our talented developers are crucial to our success, therefore we put a lot of emphasis in creating and maintaining a prosperous culture. We’re committed to open and transparent communication. Your ideas are welcomed, valued, appreciated - the ceiling for creative discussions is high.


We also have numerous work benefits for all our employees. You can read about them here!
company_description: Arrowhead Game Studios is a mid-sized game developer located in Stockholm, Sweden. We have released four games to date for PlayStation & PC.

title: UX Designer
description:
*Kreditz is transforming how businesses assess credit and risk using real-time data and NextGen Credit Scoring solutions.*
*As one of Europe’s fastest-growing FinTech scaleups - we’ve earned a place on the* 
***Sifted 100: Nordics & Benelux***
*list in both 2024 and 2025 and most recently, we were proud to receive a* 
***double win at the Credit Management & Compliance Awards 2025***
*, being named both "* 
***Fintech Rocket of the Year***
*" and "* 
***Breakthrough of the Year***
*".*
*With strong growth across the Nordics and Europe, our clients range from leading banks and iGaming giants to fast-moving digital innovators.*
**About The Position**
 We are looking for a
 **Senior UX Designer** 
 who can make complexity feel effortless.
   

  

 This is not a role for someone who only wants to “make things look pretty.” It’s a role for a strategic designer who thrives in high-stakes, data-heavy environments and who can turn sophisticated financial workflows into intuitive, world-class experiences.
   

  

**What Can Kreditz Offer**
* A once-in-a-lifetime growth journey, from startup to Global scaleup
* A journey where everyone in the team plays a crucial role for our company’s success
* Fun-loving, driven, and passionate colleagues who support each other’s success
* A culture that celebrates progress, humility, and teamwork
* We win together
* 24/7 access to gym, sauna and sports facilities at our office, plus additional wellness allowance
* Competitive base salary


**RESPONSIBILITES**
**You Will**
* Drive end-to-end user research to uncover deep behavioral patterns, maintaining a customer-centric mindset that bridges the gap between complex financial data and intuitive user experiences.
* Master the art of data-storytelling, translating quantitative findings into intuitive illustrations that make complex financial decisions feel like second nature.
* Translate complex technical and business requirements into clear problem definitions and seamless user journeys.
* Design high-velocity workflows where precision, clarity, and trust are non-negotiable.
* Create prototypes and iterate quickly in close collaboration with Product and Engineering.
* Facilitate workshops and design sprints with cross-functional teams to align stakeholders and accelerate delivery.
* Drive user-obsessed workflows and help establish UX as a scalable capability across multiple product domains.
* Support and evolve design patterns and system thinking across the platform.


 Success means users experience our platform as intuitive, confident, and effortless even when the underlying financial logic is complex.
   

  

**WE ARE LOOKING FOR**
 We believe that you are a strategic UX Designer with strong product instincts, high standards, and a deep interest in solving complex problems.
   

  

**You Likely**
* Have 5+ years of experience as a UX Designer, ideally within B2B SaaS and/or FinTech.
* Are comfortable working with financial data and using quantitative insights to validate decisions.
* Think in systems, not screens and care about scalability across products.
* Are strong in turning ambiguity into structure: clear problems, clear journeys, clear solutions.
* Collaborate naturally with developers and understand what it takes to implement design systems in real products.
* Communicate with clarity and presence — whether presenting to leadership or working hands-on with peers.
* Thrive in a fast-paced environment and can manage multiple initiatives without losing quality.


**Bonus Points If You Also Have**
* Strong qualitative research skills.
* Experience in high-transaction or high-risk product environments.
* Experience building or scaling design systems.


**WHY JOIN NOW?**
 At Kreditz, your work shapes how financial decisions are made across Europe. You’ll tackle real complexity, have real ownership, and help build a category-defining FinTech platform. With continued growth, and profitability on the horizon, strong investor backing, and a growing client base across Europe, we are entering our most exciting phase yet.
   

  

**APPOINTMENT OF ROLE**
 Q2 2026
   

  

**SCOPE**
 Full-time, permanent employment (tillsvidareanställning)
   

  

**SALARY**
 Competitive salary
   

  

**REPORTING**
 You will be reporting to the company’s CPO
   

  

**WORKPLACE**
 Danderyd, Stockholm
   

  

**RECRUITMENT PROCESS**
 Ongoing selection, we review candidates continuously.
   

  

*Last day for applications 31st March 2026*
**CRIMINAL RECORDS EXTRACT**
 As part of our recruitment process we will ask you to present a clean criminal records extract
   

  

**CONTACT**
 Lorenzo Puccio, VP Strategic Operations, Lorenzo@kreditz.com
   

  

 For more information about the role feel free to reach out to our CPO, Spilios Tzouras, spilios.tzouras@kreditz.com
   

  

 Intelligent credit- & risk decisions made easy with open banking & AI-technology

title: Product Designer
description:
**TL;DR** 
 - We’re looking for world-class product designers to help shape Lovable. You’ll lead projects end-to-end, collaborating closely with engineering. We expect a broad range of design skills, and exceptional taste. You’ll join a team at the forefront of AI, enabling anyone to create software.
   

  

**Why Lovable?**
 Lovable lets anyone and everyone build software with plain English. From solopreneurs to Fortune 100 teams, millions of people use Lovable to transform raw ideas into real products - fast. We are at the forefront of a foundational shift in software creation, which means you have an unprecedented opportunity to change the way the world works. Over 2 million people in 200+ countries already use Lovable to launch businesses, automate work, and bring their ideas to life. And we’re just getting started.
   

  

 We’re a small, talent-dense team building a generation-defining company from Stockholm. We value extreme ownership, high velocity and low-ego collaboration. We seek out people who care deeply, ship fast, and are eager to make a dent in the world.
   

  

**What We’re Looking For**
* A track record of working in high performing, fast-paced startup environments
* A portfolio showcasing successful product work loved by users and produced in high-velocity teams
* Talent for simplifying complicated user journeys into intuitive experiences
* Strong prototyping abilities with emphasis on clear visual communication
* Fluency with design systems and technical implementations
* Outstanding command of visual design, UI patterns, and interaction principles
* High aptitude for shipping and learning extraordinarily quickly
* Bonus: You ship to production, perhaps with a little help from AI
* Bonus: Experience designing AI products


**What You’ll Do**
**In one sentence:** 
 Design Lovable, making it the most Lovable piece of software ever.
   

  

* Craft detailed user flows and high-fidelity mockups for new features
* Own design projects from conception to delivery, collaborating with engineering or ideally implementing yourself with AI (we'll train you)
* Be scrappy and hands on with any design assets needed
* Establish scalable design processes that uphold quality standards
* Champion quick wins and impactful improvements
* Contribute to improving the design quality of Lovable's AI
* Help set the bar for design quality and the culture for how design works at Lovable


**How We Hire**
* Fill in a short form then jump on an initial exploratory call.
* We'll send you a quick take-home asking to present your best work over a loom video presentation.
* Join us for a round of interviews to discuss your experience in more depth
* Join us for trial work lasting 1-2 days remote or on-site. We'll see how you tick and you get to meet the team and explore whether joining Lovable feels right for you.


**Important Note** 
 :
   

  

* Please submit your application in English. It’s our company language so you’ll be speaking lots of it if you join.
* We treat all candidates equally - if you’re interested please apply through our careers portal.

title: UX Researcher
description:
**TL;DR –** 
 We’re looking for a curious, fast-moving UX Researcher to help shape the future of Lovable. You’ll uncover how users think, feel, and act, turning insights into product direction. You’ll design studies, test concepts, and experiment with new AI-assisted ways of learning from users, helping us move fast without compromising on craft.
   

  

**Why Lovable?**
 Lovable lets anyone build software with plain English. From solopreneurs to Fortune 100 teams, millions of people use Lovable to transform raw ideas into real products — fast. We are at the forefront of a fundamental shift in how software is created: from code-first to intelligence-first.
   

  

 Over 2 million people in 200+ countries already use Lovable to launch businesses, automate workflows, and bring their ideas to life. And we’re just getting started.
   

  

 We’re a small, talent-dense team building a generation-defining company from Stockholm. We operate with high ownership, high velocity, and low-ego collaboration. We care deeply, move fast, and are here to build something that outlives us.
   

  

**What We’re Looking For**
 We’re looking for a researcher who balances
 **curiosity and rigor** 
 — someone who loves asking
 *why* 
 , tests
 *how* 
 , and measures
 *what’s working* 
 . You’re as comfortable in a user interview as you are interpreting event data or survey results, and you know how to connect human stories with product metrics.
   

  

* 3–6 years of experience in UX research, human-centered design, or a related role.
* Proficiency in qualitative methods (interviews, usability testing, concept testing).
* Experience with survey design, data analysis, and working with behavioral data (e.g., from analytics tools) is a plus
* Strong synthesis skills, distilling findings into insights that influence design and product decisions.
* Excellent communication and storytelling skills to bring research to life for cross-functional teams.
* Comfortable in fast-paced, iterative environments with shifting priorities.
* Experience working closely with designers, PMs, and data scientists.


**What You’ll Do**
 In one sentence:
   

  

**Turn user insights into product direction that shapes how the world builds software.**
* Partner with product, design, growth and data teams to define learning goals for upcoming features and experiments.
* Explore new AI-driven approaches for recruiting, analysis, and synthesis — expanding how we learn from users.
* Conduct user sessions directly with Lovable users, gathering firsthand insights into behaviors, motivations, and unmet needs.
* Collaborate with data scientists to interpret behavioral data and validate qualitative findings.
* Contribute to building research frameworks, templates, and best practices for scalable discovery at Lovable.


**How We Hire**
* Fill out a short form and hop on a quick intro call with our recruiting team
* Meet designers and PMs to discuss your approach to research
* Walk through past work and real examples of your process
* Final conversations with product leadership


**About Your Application**
 Please submit your application in English — it’s our company language.
   

  

 We treat all candidates equally, so please apply through our careers portal.

title: UX Artist
description:
As a UX artist at Embark, you will enable amazing user experiences for our gamers, experiences that they will remember and talk about for decades. Here you will work closely together with other talents to create everything from 2D elements, animations, menus, HUD, to living and inviting scenes with 3D components.
   

  

 If you like to spend time thinking about how players explore and experience games, and perhaps you also imagine a future where players can be part of creating their own unique experiences, then Embark might be your future home
   

  

**Example Of Responsibilities**
* Collaborate with a wide range of talents at Embark to deliver a great user experience
* Create aesthetically delightful visuals that enhances the gameplay experience
* Evaluating different software, techniques, engines and pipelines and help us get better and change how we work in the future


**We would love if you have**
* A creative and curious mind
* A strong passion for art, design and games
* Excellent visual skillset and deep artistic understanding and knowledge
* Experience of following directions and deliver to quality from a visual, game play and technical perspective
* Professional English communication skills


 At Embark we offer competitive salaries, passionate colleagues to share knowledge with and much more, but most of all we invite you to take part of a journey into the unknown, to build creative, surprising and beautiful experiences together.
   

  

 We welcome game makers of all sex, class, colour, age, gender identity, education, religion, opinion, culture, nation of origin, language, sexual orientation, shape, size, and ability.
   

  

 Did we leave anyone out? Well, we welcome you, too! We think that the gaming industry is made better when everyone has a seat at the table.
   

  

 Be yourself at Embark and make games while doing so. Please apply with confidence. We can’t wait to hear from you (in English)!
